content:
MODULE: cosmos.tools.productivity.daily_summary
FILE: cosmos/tools/productivity/daily_summary.py (259 lines)
CATEGORY: tools

DESCRIPTION: cosmos Daily Summary - Automated Activity Digest

"What did you accomplish today? Let me remind you!"

Features:
- Auto-generated daily summaries
- Memory-based activity tracking
- Key accomplishments extraction
- Tomorrow's priorities
- Weekly/monthly rollups

CLASSES:
- DailySummary: A daily activity summary.
- DailySummaryGenerator: Generate and manage daily summaries.
  Methods: async def generate_summary(self, date: str=None, memory_system=None, focus_timer=None, force: bool=F
  Methods: def get_summary(self, date: str=None) -> Optional[DailySummary]
  Methods: def get_week_summary(self) -> Dict[str, Any]
  Methods: def format_summary(self, summary: DailySummary) -> str
